Book Appointment
Consultant Psychiatrist

Dr. Anita Sharma

MBBS, DPM, MRCPsych (UK)

Experienced psychiatrist dedicated to providing compassionate, evidence-based care for adults and children. With international training and a holistic approach, Dr. Sharma helps patients navigate mental health challenges with clarity and confidence.

Book Consultation View Services

About Dr. Sharma

Dr. Anita Sharma is a Consultant Psychiatrist with over 15 years of experience in mental health care. She completed her medical training at King George's Medical College, Lucknow, followed by specialized psychiatry training at the Institute of Human Behaviour and Allied Sciences, Delhi.

Her expertise extends internationally, having trained at the prestigious Maudsley Hospital in London, where she gained valuable insights into cutting-edge psychiatric treatments and therapies. Dr. Sharma believes in a patient-centered approach, combining medication management with psychotherapy to provide comprehensive care tailored to each individual's needs.

At Mind Grace Clinic, she leads a multidisciplinary team committed to reducing stigma and making mental healthcare accessible, confidential, and effective for all patients.

Education & Training

01

MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery

King George's Medical College, Lucknow

Foundation in medical sciences and clinical practice.

02

DPM - Diploma in Psychological Medicine

Institute of Human Behaviour and Allied Sciences, Delhi

Specialized training in psychiatry and mental health disorders.

03

MRCPsych - Member of Royal College of Psychiatrists

Maudsley Hospital, London, UK

Advanced international training in evidence-based psychiatric care.

Areas of Expertise

Mood Disorders
Anxiety & Stress
Adult ADHD
Child Development
Sleep Disorders
Geriatric Psychiatry
Addiction Medicine
Psychotherapy

Care Philosophy

Whole Person Care

Treating the mind, body, and social context together for lasting wellness.

Evidence-Based

Using proven treatments backed by the latest scientific research.

Strict Confidentiality

Your privacy is paramount. All consultations are completely confidential.

Ready to Start Your Journey?

Take the first step towards better mental health with a confidential consultation.
